Creates a capability admission proposal.

## Import

```ts
import { capabilityAdmissionProposal } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions";
```

## Signature

```ts
function capabilityAdmissionProposal(opts: Omit<CapabilityAdmissionProposal, "kind">): CapabilityAdmissionProposal
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `opts` | `Omit<CapabilityAdmissionProposal, "kind">` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

The capability admission proposal result.

## Example

```ts
import { capabilityAdmissionProposal } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions";
```
